items.name: status-badge
items.title: Status Badge
items.description: Outline badge with a semantic status dot (success / info / warning / neutral). Use for connection states, lifecycle states, and any tabular status column.

items.name: step-ladder
items.title: Step Ladder
items.description: Numbered ordered-step list, vertical or horizontal. Use for workflows, priority orders, and any 'do these in order' explanation.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Compact metric card with optional icon, big value, and label. Use in dashboard summary strips.

items.name: section-header
items.title: Section Header
items.description: Section heading with optional mono hint text and a right-aligned action slot. Use above tables and content sections inside a page.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: The slim top context bar: sidebar trigger, a muted context label (a plain string) or a breadcrumb trail (a node), and a right-aligned slot for status or actions. The page's real h1 lives in the body via PageTitle.

items.name: hub-page
items.title: Hub Page
items.description: The one page scaffold every /synclair route composes from: the slim context bar (PageHeader), a centered max-w-6xl body column with the page-enter entrance, and the in-body PageTitle — display-scale h1, right meta slot, lead paragraph. Exports HubPage plus PageBody, PageTitle, and PageLead for pages that wrap the body in a provider.

items.name: pill-toggle
items.title: Pill Toggle
items.description: A rounded-pill segmented toggle for FILTER facets (Origin, Usage, a doc-type facet) — never for switching what a page shows (that's Tabs / Tabs Nav). Renders as URL links (with href) for server components or as buttons (with onValueChange) for client ones, with optional trailing counts.

items.name: tabs-nav
items.title: Tabs Nav
items.description: URL-driven page-view tabs — the shadcn TabsList look rendered as links, so server components can switch views through the URL and every view deep-links. Content switching gets tab chrome; filtering gets Pill Toggle.

items.name: surface-switcher
items.title: Surface Switcher
items.description: THE one control for flipping between a multi-frontend project's app surfaces — the same URL-driven tab rail on tier galleries and the pages sitemap. Gates on isMultiSurface() internally, so single-surface projects render nothing.

items.name: definition-list
items.title: Definition List
items.description: Key/value facts as a real <dl> — the standard, accessible way to render settings and about facts, instead of forcing them into a headerless two-column table.

items.name: stat-grid
items.title: Stat Grid
items.description: An at-a-glance panel of labeled facts (a spec sheet): uppercase label, value, and optional note per item on a responsive grid. Supersedes the bordered gap-px cell grid that read as a block table.

items.name: viewport-frame
items.title: Viewport Frame
items.description: The documentation preview stage — Storybook canvas semantics: device-width switcher (wide/desktop/768/375/fullscreen), stage light/dark flip, and a code toggle with copy, above a dot-grid stage. The standard wrapper on doc pages for every tier — not for product UI.

items.name: wireframe-kit
items.title: Wireframe Kit
items.description: Primitives for anatomy wireframes in documentation — WireframeFrame (dashed = placeholder, solid = chrome, focal = primary tint), WireframeBlock, SkeletonBar/SkeletonRow. Wireframes are built live from these, never from Figma image exports. Not for product UI.

items.name: app-sidebar
items.title: App Sidebar
items.description: The prototype's app-shell navigation sidebar: brand header, global ⌘K search trigger, Synclair / System / Library nav groups with active states, external reference links, snapshot footer.

items.name: source-editor
items.title: Source Editor
items.description: Single page-level slide-over that reads and edits one markdown source file at a time: SourceEditorProvider owns the sheet, SourceRow opens it. Preview (rendered markdown) / Edit (mono textarea) tabs with a confirm-to-save step, lazy-loaded and saved via server actions. Used to edit skill/agent .md files from AI Setup.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Global ⌘K / Ctrl-K search dialog over the whole system: components, blocks, templates, skills, agents, and routes. Grouped results; navigates on select. Mounted once in the app shell.

items.name: markdown
items.title: Markdown
items.description: Renders markdown in the app's neutral, dense voice (GFM, styled headings/lists/tables/code, no typography plugin). Optional html mode renders repo-committed inline SVG that inherits theme tokens — never enable for external input. The one prose renderer; every summary, doc note, and digest goes through it.

items.name: summary-shell
items.title: Summary Shell
items.description: The one shell every distilled summary renders through (Knowledge briefs, the System Map overview): a bordered card that normalizes the title treatment — leading # stripped from the markdown and rendered consistently, optional mono meta line — then the Markdown body.

items.name: filter-bar
items.title: Filter Bar
items.description: URL-driven facet chip rows for galleries (origin, usage): each chip is a link that toggles its query param while preserving the others, so filtered views are shareable with zero client state. Composes PillToggle in URL mode, one group per facet.

items.name: data-model-diagram
items.title: Data Model Diagram
items.description: Deterministic, token-themed ER diagram for a digested data model: FK edges parsed from field notes, crow's-foot at the many side and arrowhead at the one side, entities laid out in reference layers, capped at the ~10 most-connected entities for orientation. Pure server-rendered SVG.

items.name: library-explorer
items.title: Library Explorer
items.description: The two-pane shell every library route renders in: a floating sidebar with surface + tier selectors over a grouped, filterable item list ('/' focuses the filter), the routed page beside it under a breadcrumb PageHeader. Scope and tier live in the URL path; single-surface projects render the same shell minus the surface level.

items.name: tier-gallery
items.title: Tier Gallery
items.description: The card gallery a library tier page renders: origin/usage filter chips, category-grouped ComponentCards with live zoom-to-fit preview thumbnails and status/origin badges, host-coverage strip in companion mode, concept grouping with availability chips on multi-surface projects, and educating empty states.

items.name: component-doc-view
items.title: Component Doc View
items.description: Renders one registered item's documentation page from its ComponentDoc: identity header with tier/origin/status/doc-sync badges, live or host previews, Intent, Anatomy with region table, Examples with viewport framing, Interactions, Responsive, States, Props, and the import-graph 'Used in' section. Resolves concept pages and surface collisions on multi-surface projects.

items.name: foundations-sections
items.title: Foundations Sections
items.description: The live style-guide sections behind /synclair/foundations: color ramps with click-to-copy swatches, typography scale and roles, spacing, radius, opacity, shape/elevation, motion, and iconography — all rendered LIVE from lib/system/tokens.ts and the seed so they cannot drift from globals.css. Companion mode shows only the host project's documented palette.

items.name: library-tier-page
items.title: Library Tier Page
items.description: The one screen design behind all three library catalog routes — Components, Blocks, and Templates are the same view instantiated with a different catalog slice: title strip with live census, facet filter chips, category-grouped card gallery. The reference implementation for the template tier: a template documents a VIEW, its files are the routes that instantiate it, and its doc page embeds the running route via route().
